title: Ethiopian Tibs Fritters
description: Crispy, spicy fritters filled with Ethiopian-style stir-fried beef. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together 1 cup of flour and 1/4 cup of all-purpose flour. Add eggs and mix until a dough forms.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a cookie scoop, drop small balls of dough into the hot oil.
Fry fritters for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown, flipping halfway through.
In a separate pan, heat 2 tablespoons of tibs spice blend over medium heat.
Add sliced onion and minced garlic to the pan and cook until softened.
Add beef to the pan and cook until browned, breaking into small pieces as it cooks.
In a large bowl, combine cooked fritters and beef mixture. Toss to combine.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
